server/src/image_tool/pipeline.py :: _encode_pdf_with_budget
def _encode_pdf_with_budget(raster: Raster, max_bytes: int) -> bytes:
    best = write_pdf(raster, quality=25)
    longest = max(raster.width, raster.height)
    ratio = 1.0
    while ratio >= 0.35:
        target_longest = max(256, int(longest * ratio))
        working = fit_inside(raster, target_longest)
        for quality in range(95, 44, -5):
            candidate = write_pdf(working, quality=quality)
            best = candidate
            if len(candidate) <= max_bytes:
                return candidate
        ratio -= 0.05
    return best

server/src/image_tool/pipeline.py :: load_raster_from_bytes
def load_raster_from_bytes(
    data: bytes,
    source_name: str | None = None,
    *,
    strip_metadata: bool = True,
    apply_orientation: bool = True,
) -> Raster:
    """Decode image bytes; optionally strip JPEG metadata and apply EXIF orientation."""
    exif = read_exif(data) if data.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8") else None
    working = data
    if strip_metadata and data.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8"):
        working = strip_jpeg_metadata(data)
    raster = decode_image(working, source_name)
    if apply_orientation and exif and exif.orientation:
        raster = apply_exif_orientation(raster, exif.orientation)
    return raster

server/src/image_tool/pipeline.py :: refine_compressed_image
def refine_compressed_image(
    data: bytes,
    output_format: OutputFormat,
    post_filter: str,
    max_mb: float | int | str | None = None,
    strip_metadata: bool = True,
) -> bytes:
    """Apply a finish filter after compression, then re-encode for download."""
    normalized = (post_filter or "none").strip().lower()
    if normalized == "none":
        return data
    if output_format.extension == "pdf":
        raise ValueError("Finish filters are not supported for PDF output.")

    max_bytes = max_bytes_from_mb(max_mb)
    decoded = decode_image(data)
    filtered = apply_post_filter(decoded, normalized)
    rgb = add_watermark(filtered.to_rgb())
    encoded = _encode_raster_with_budget(rgb, output_format, max_bytes)
    return _finalize_output(encoded, output_format, strip_metadata)

server/src/image_tool/pipeline.py :: convert_raster
def convert_raster(
    raster: Raster,
    output_format: OutputFormat,
    max_mb: float | int | str | None = None,
    strip_metadata: bool = True,
    post_filter: str = "none",
) -> bytes:
    max_bytes = max_bytes_from_mb(max_mb)
    rgb = add_watermark(raster.to_rgb())
    encoded = _encode_raster_with_budget(rgb, output_format, max_bytes)
    encoded = _finalize_output(encoded, output_format, strip_metadata)

    normalized = (post_filter or "none").strip().lower()
    if normalized != "none":
        encoded = refine_compressed_image(
            encoded,
            output_format,
            normalized,
            max_mb=max_mb,
            strip_metadata=strip_metadata,
        )
    return encoded
